title: Lush & Fungus.
description:
Forge Modpack 1.20.1 based on caves, exploration and fungus.
Enhanced Alexs Caves and Bosses, better animations and highly optimized for low requeriments PC and budget servers.
body:
### ![Descripcion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/642a708de5889bb0dfcdaf5c08192a38b94f77d0.png)
- **"Lush & Fungus"** is designed for **explorers and adventurers** who thrive on discovering new experiences and tackling **challenges**. This modpack, built for Forge 1.20.1, takes your journey underground to new heights, featuring the immersive worlds of **Alex’s Caves** and **Alex’s Mobs**—along with the rest of Alex's creations—elevated to their **fullest potential**.

- Experience the best of what Minecraft has to offer, **enhanced** by a blend of stunning textures,**new animations**, and an exciting combat system that keeps the gameplay fresh and engaging. Prepare yourself for **colossal dungeons** that dot the landscape and familiar structures **reimagined**, delivering a totally fresh experience each time you play.

- Moreover, **"Lush & Fungus"** boasts **high optimization** for both client and server, ensuring that even with the demanding features of Forge, nearly **any computer** can smoothly enjoy this extraordinary adventure. Whether you're delving into massive underground biomes or conquering revamped dungeons, this modpack offers an entirely new way to explore, fight, and survive in **Minecraft**.
